name: Mailchimp
description: Manage subscribers and campaigns in Mailchimp
author: awaitstep

email.label: Email
email.description: Subscriber email address. Used by: Add Subscriber, Update Subscriber, Get Subscriber.

mergeFields.label: Merge Fields
mergeFields.description: Merge fields e.g. {"FNAME": "John"}. Used by: Add Subscriber, Update Subscriber.

status.label: Status
status.description: Subscriber status. Used by: Add Subscriber, Update Subscriber.

campaignType.label: Campaign Type
campaignType.description: Campaign type. Used by: Create Campaign.

subject.label: Subject
subject.description: Campaign subject line. Used by: Create Campaign.

fromName.label: From Name
fromName.description: Sender name. Used by: Create Campaign.

replyTo.label: Reply-To
replyTo.description: Reply-to email. Used by: Create Campaign.
